name: grey room
items_start: Box with apparatus pointing at chair
hints: The chair and apparatus look important. This might be an ID processing station.
SIT in the CHAIR - the apparatus may create an ID badge or picture for you.
GO CHAIR or SIT CHAIR to sit down. The apparatus creates ID photos - you need these to pass security doors.
SIT in the chair, then interact with the colored buttons to get different security-level ID badges. You need the right badge for each colored door.

effects: Message: It seems safe. Shall I sit down?
Message: It seems safe. Shall I sit down?

notes: ID photo station. Sit in the chair to move to room 5 where you can use colored buttons/keys to create different security-level ID badges needed for the colored security doors throughout the base.
